data.title: TN judge grants Kalshi an injunction against state action; deems sports contracts within CFTC purview.
data.description: Judge Aleta Trauger has granted Kalshi a preliminary injunction against Tennessee, stating that the state's sports event contracts are subject to CFTC (Commodity Futures Trading Commission) jurisdiction.

data.title: Lamar Advertising reports Quarterly revenue of $595.93 million, Operating income jumps to $196.1 million. EPS at $1.50. Adjusted EBITDA rises to $288.87 million.
data.description: Lamar Advertising Co. (NASDAQ: LAMR) announced its quarterly results recently. The firm saw a 2.8% year-over-year increase in net revenue, reaching $595.93 million, which surpassed the analyst estimate of $592.45 million. The quarterly operating income surged to $196.1 million from $36.7 million the previous year. The quarterly EPS stood at $1.50, falling short of the projected $1.51. Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter climbed 3.7% year-over-year to $288.87 million. The company also generated $271.2 million in... This information is available in full on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ovintiv to release quarterly earnings report, expected EPS of $1.00, investors hopeful for positive guidance.
data.description: Ovintiv, trading on NYSE under OVV, is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Monday, February 23, 2026. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.00 for the company. Investors holding Ovintiv stocks are eagerly awaiting the announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations and provide positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. It is essential for new investors to recognize that stock values can be significantly impacted by future forecasts rather than solely focusing on past performance. In the previous quarter, Ovintiv outperformed EPS estimates by $0.07, resulting in a 1.74% decline in share price the following day. For a more detailed narrative, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Biomarin Pharmaceutical to report Q4 earnings on Feb 23; analysts estimate EPS of $0.41. Focus on guidance for future growth.
data.description: Biopharmaceutical company Biomarin Pharmaceutical (NASDAQ: BMRN) is scheduled to release its latest quarterly earnings report on February 23, 2026. Analysts are forecasting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.41 for the company. Investors will be looking for Biomarin Pharmaceutical to exceed this estimate and provide positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. It is important to note that while exceeding or falling short of earnings estimates can impact stock prices, guidance for future growth is often a more significant factor. In the previous quarter, Biomarin Pharmaceutical reported an EPS that missed expectations by $0.39. For more details, the complete article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Real Estate icon Teresa King Kinney to retire as CEO of MIAMI Associaton of Realtors after 33 years.
data.description: After serving as CEO of the MIAMI Association of Realtors (MIAMI) for 33 years, Teresa King Kinney, a well-respected figure in the real estate industry, is set to step down at the end of the year. The announcement was made on Feb. 20, 2026. MIAMI is known as the biggest local real estate association in the nation.

data.title: UST named 2025 TestMu AI Partner of the Year for the Americas, recognized for their AI and tech solutions.
data.description: Aliso Viejo, California - UST, a prominent company specializing in AI and technology transformation solutions, revealed today that it has received the prestigious title of 2025 TestMu AI Partner of the Year for the Americas.

data.title: Intapp (NASDAQ: INTA) to join Morgan Stanley Tech, Media & Telecom Conference on March 2, 2026 in San Francisco at 4:05pm PT.
data.description: Intapp, Inc. revealed that their senior management team is set to partake in an investor conference. This global provider of AI-powered solutions for professionals in advisory, capital markets, and legal sectors disclosed their participation in the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference. The event is scheduled for Monday, March 2, 2026, in San Francisco, California, with the presentation slated for 4:05pm PT. A live webcast of the presentation will be available, with an archived version accessible afterwards. Intapp, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol INTA.

data.title: Former Maryland Gov. Larry Hogan joins SecurityScorecard advisory board to enhance third-party risk management in public sector, critical infrastructure.
data.description: In New York, SecurityScorecard, a leading provider of threat-informed third-party risk management (TPRM), revealed the addition of Former Maryland Governor Larry Hogan to its Advisory Board. The move aims to enhance SecurityScorecard’s support for public sector and critical infrastructure entities in handling third-party cyber risks. Hogan, who prioritized cybersecurity throughout his two terms as governor, bolstered Maryland's cybersecurity efforts significantly in that time. This collaboration indicates SecurityScorecard’s commitment to aiding organizations in navigating cyber challenges efficiently.

data.title: Samsara named top Supply Chain & Logistics Software by G2 in 2026 with over 2,100 customer reviews - Business Wire.
data.description: Samsara Inc. has been recognized as the top Supply Chain & Logistics Software Product of 2026 by G2, the prominent software marketplace. This accolade, based on over 2,100 customer reviews, solidifies Samsara's standing as the premier AI operations management company. Samsara's Connected Operations® Platform has been lauded for its excellence, making it the No. 1 choice in its industry. The company's leadership in customer satisfaction is evident through this prestigious award.

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield introduces first AI model quantifying momentum in CRE, impacting Built Environment.
data.description: Cushman & Wakefield recently unveiled the first-ever model in the commercial real estate sector that measures the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on the built environment. This innovative tool aims to quantify the momentum of AI within the industry. The launch of this model marks a significant milestone and highlights the growing influence of AI in commercial real estate.

data.title: ISG is studying providers helping enterprises revamp data architectures with Cloudera Data Platform for AI.
data.description: A research study has been initiated by ISG to analyze providers aiding businesses in revamping their data architectures with Cloudera Data Platform as a foundation ready for artificial intelligence (AI).

data.title: Fintech company Yendo receives $200M from i80 Group to expand AI-enabled credit card products and scale customer base.
data.description: A fintech company, Yendo, catering to main street consumers, received a $200 million funding commitment from i80 Group. This capital infusion will facilitate up to $200 million in new credit card originations. The aim is to expand Yendo's customer base and offer responsible credit products to consumers nationwide. This commitment comes on the heels of a $50 million Series B funding for Yendo. The funds will be utilized to expedite the growth of the company's range of credit card offerings.

data.title: CR Fitness Holdings to open Crunch Bearden, a 46,819 sq ft fitness facility in Knoxville, Tenn. Fastest-growing Crunch Fitness franchisee.
data.description: In Knoxville, Tennessee, CR Fitness Holdings LLC, the top franchisee of Crunch Fitness, is set to launch Crunch Bearden, a cutting-edge fitness center spanning 46,819 square feet. The new facility is expected to be the largest in the area.

data.title: Scrubbing Bubbles® Easy Clean wins 2026 Product of the Year USA Award with 40,000 American shoppers voting.
data.description: A recent survey revealed that 40,000 American consumers have voted the Scrubbing Bubbles® Easy Clean as the most innovative product in the bathroom cleaning category. Developed to streamline and enhance bathroom cleaning routines, this product line has gained popularity for its efficient performance. Located in Racine, Wisconsin, this news was disclosed on February 20, 2026.

data.title: Carnes Crossroads in Goose Creek, SC wins top national award for residential homebuilding on Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: In Goose Creek, South Carolina, Carnes Crossroads received prestigious recognition from the National Association of Homebuilders on February 17, 2026. It was awarded as the Residential Community of the Year and Amenity of the Year, marking a significant achievement for the development. This honor solidifies Carnes Crossroads' status as a top-tier residential community.
